Meaning.Vi: Sàn trải bằng vải, len, sợi tổng hợp, thường dùng để lót sàn nhà
Meaning.En: A thick fabric covering for a floor, typically made of wool, nylon, or other fibers, used for warmth, comfort, or decoration.
Meaning.Example: The living room has a soft red carpet that absorbs sound well.

Situation.Vi: Mua và lắp đặt thảm cho phòng khách
Situation.En: Buying and installing carpet in a living room

Situation.Vi: Vệ sinh thảm định kỳ bằng máy hút bụi hoặc dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp
Situation.En: Cleaning carpet regularly with a vacuum or professional service

Meaning.En: To cover a floor with carpet.
Meaning.Example: They decided to carpet the entire upstairs hallway.

Situation.Vi: Thợ lát thảm đang trải thảm mới cho căn hộ chung cư
Situation.En: A carpet installer is laying new carpet in a condominium unit
